widgets_values:
🩻 Dense architecture is LaRI's STRONG domain — and 'predict the far
building's occluded lower floors behind the near roofline' is the
layered-ray-intersection use case. The restrict mask is the FOREGROUND
DEPTH BAND (the node's own report recommends exactly this).
📐 Metric scale comes from COUNTED STOREYS (the 'PALM TOO' tenement,
5 × 3.5m → camera ≈ 60-64m) — the 1.6m fallback fires on this vantage.

nodes.title: 🩻 LaRI — restricted to the fg band
ATLAS RESEARCH — NYC / MASKED LARI COMPLETION — PROJECT / GRAY REVIEW

widgets_values:
The anchored-walls variant (atlas_dmp_angle_anchored_newyork) closes
the gap with GEOMETRY where a base is visible; this one INVENTS the
occluded structure — LaRI hidden depth + LaMa pixels — so a dolly
past the near roofline reveals plausible lower floors instead of a
tear. Restricting to the fg band keeps visible surfaces untouched.
